spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Move custom package imports to the top of the import block, separating them from standard library and framework imports.
Replace tab-based indentation with spaces to conform to standard Java coding conventions.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Changed leading tabs to 4 spaces for all method bodies and annotations.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Remove trailing whitespace and empty lines containing only whitespace to clean up the file structure.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Removed empty lines with trailing spaces between methods.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Break long method signatures and chained calls into multiple lines for improved readability.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Split `retrieveDetailsForCourse` parameters and `registerStudentForCourse` parameters and `ServletUriComponentsBuilder` chain across multiple lines.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Reformat the String.format call in toString() to improve readability by placing the format string on a single line.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: return String.format("Course [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, steps=%s]", id, name, description, steps);

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Simplify the null-check logic in the equals method by consolidating conditional returns.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: if (id == null) { return other.id == null; } else return id.equals(other.id);

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace @Component with @Service to align with Spring Boot 3 best practices for service layer beans.
Add final modifier to the static students list to enforce immutability of the reference.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: private static List<Student> students -> private static final List<Student> students

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Move SecureRandom initialization from a field declaration to a final field declaration for better encapsulation.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: private SecureRandom random = new SecureRandom(); -> private final SecureRandom random = new SecureRandom();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace Arrays.asList with List.of to use Java 9+ immutable list factory methods.
Rename course variables from course1-4 to courseOne-Four for better readability.
Replace if-null-return block with ternary operator for concise null handling.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: if (student == null) { return null; } return student.getCourses(); -> return student == null ? null : student.getCourses();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Remove unused import java.util.Arrays after migrating to List.of.
Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3.0 requirements.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Changed @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) to @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) and updated imports from org.junit to org.junit.jupiter.api.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new testing framework.
Replace the JUnit 4 Spring runner with the JUnit 5 Spring extension for test context management.
Remove the deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest as it is no longer supported in Spring Boot 3.
Add @WithMockUser to provide a default authenticated user context, replacing the removed secure=false behavior.
Replace Arrays.asList with List.of to use the modern immutable list factory method available in Java 9+.
Correct the description string in test data to match the expected JSON output format.
Reformat code indentation and line breaks to adhere to modern Java coding standards.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the explicit @EnableAutoConfiguration annotation because its functionality is already included in the @SpringBootApplication meta-annotation.
Uncomment the @Configuration annotation to activate the security configuration class.
Add {noop} prefix to plaintext passwords to comply with Spring Security 5.8+ requirement for explicit password encoding.
Correct a typo in the course description string from '10 Steps' to '10Steps'.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.
Correct the expected JSON string in the test to match the actual data format (removing space).
Update the Course object creation in the test to use the corrected description string.
Add throws JSONException to the test method signature to satisfy compiler requirements for JSONAssert.
Add @WithMockUser annotation to provide a default security context for the test, required because Spring Boot 3 enables security by default.
Remove the deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest as it is no longer supported in Spring Boot 3.
Update test data strings to remove spaces in description fields to match expected output format.

spring-boot-web-application/src/main/jav.general_idea: Explicitly configure a NoOpPasswordEncoder to satisfy Spring Security 5.8+ requirements that mandate password encoding for in-memory authentication.
